description: TTY resolver uses ✓ for {check:done} but [ ] for {check:open}. Use ☐ instead for visual consistency. Update resolve.go (line 111, TTY path only — markdown path should stay as [ ] for compatibility). Update docs/design-output.md token vocabulary if it documents check rendering.

comments.text: Also add color: dim for ☐ (open), green ✓ is already handled via check:done marker. Add a check:open marker to the TTY path so colorize can style it.

title: Use ☐ for open checkbox in TTY output
